field_values.scene_title: Transition the protagonist from the terrestrial world to the inciting...
field_values.action_summary: Carter's horse leads him to a narrow cave entrance on a high trail. After checking Powell, Carter enters the large, ancient chamber. Inside, he is overcome by an unnatural drowsiness and collapses into unconsciousness.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the cave entrance on the cliff; low-angle shots inside the chamber to emphasize scale; close-ups of Carter's eyes drooping; slow fade to black.
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Lighting transition (from bright exterior to dark/dim cave)
the "unnatural" quality of the drowsiness (visual cues like heavy eyelids or blurred vision).
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC005

- chapter_id: `CH001`
- scene_title: `Transition the protagonist from the terrestrial world to the inciting...`

## Production Intent

Transition the protagonist from the terrestrial world to the inciting supernatural event.

## Storyboard

Carter's horse leads him to a narrow cave entrance on a high trail. After checking Powell, Carter enters the large, ancient chamber. Inside, he is overcome by an unnatural drowsiness and collapses into unconsciousness.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
